import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        hidden_dim = 256
        output_dim = 4
        
        # Attention-based pooling layers
        self.visual_attn_pool = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn_pool = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Modality-specific projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, output_dim)
        )
    
    def attention_pool(self, x, pool_layer):
        attn_weights = F.softmax(pool_layer(x), dim=1)
        return (x * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        visual_pooled = self.attention_pool(visual, self.visual_attn_pool)
        text_pooled = self.attention_pool(text, self.text_attn_pool)
        
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        elem_fusion = visual_feat * text_feat
        gated_visual = gate * visual_feat
        gated_text = (1 - gate) * text_feat
        
        fused = torch.cat([elem_fusion, gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Attention pooling over sequence dimension
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(visual)  # [B, 256, 1]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(text)  # [B, 77, 1]
        
        v_weights = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=1)
        t_weights = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=1)
        
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project and normalize
        v = self.visual_norm(self.visual_proj(v_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        t = self.text_norm(self.text_proj(t_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, 256]
        
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * (1 - gate)
        
        # Element-wise fusion
        elem_fusion = v_gated * t_gated
        
        # Final fusion and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, elem_fusion], dim=-1)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling
        self.v_pool_attn = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_pool_attn = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, 1)
        
        # Feature projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        self.cross_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.cross_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating network
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling
        v_w = F.softmax(self.v_pool_attn(visual), dim=1)
        t_w = F.softmax(self.t_pool_attn(text), dim=1)
        
        v_pool = (visual * v_w).sum(dim=1)
        t_pool = (text * t_w).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.v_proj(v_pool)
        t_feat = self.t_proj(t_pool)
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        v_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_v(v_feat))
        t_cross = torch.tanh(self.cross_t(t_feat))
        interaction = v_cross * t_cross
        
        # Gating
        concat = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate * interaction + (1 - gate) * (v_feat + t_feat) / 2
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 4)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool and project
        v = self.visual_proj(visual.mean(dim=1)).unsqueeze(1)  # B x 1 x 256
        t = self.text_proj(text.mean(dim=1)).unsqueeze(1)  # B x 1 x 256
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_attn, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)  # B x 1 x 256
        t = self.norm(t + t_attn).squeeze(1)  # B x 256
        v = v.squeeze(1)  # B x 256
        
        # Gating fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)  # B x 512
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # B x 256
        gated = gate * v + (1 - gate) * t  # B x 256
        
        # Element-wise product
        elem = v * t  # B x 256
        
        # Combine
        combined = torch.cat([gated, elem], dim=-1)  # B x 512
        
        # Fuse
        fused = self.fusion(combined)  # B x 256
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(fused)  # B x 4
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        # Use dimensions from API contract directly
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 128
        
        # Feature projection layers
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden_dim, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gating
        self.gate = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim)
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Project to hidden dim
        V = self.visual_norm(F.relu(self.visual_proj(visual)))  # [B, 256, 128]
        T = self.text_norm(F.relu(self.text_proj(text)))  # [B, 77, 128]
        
        # Adaptive pooling to reduce sequence length
        V_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(V.transpose(1, 2), 32).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, 128]
        T_pooled = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(T.transpose(1, 2), 16).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, 128]
        
        # Cross-attention
        V_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(V_pooled, T_pooled, T_pooled)
        V_fused = V_pooled + V_cross  # Residual
        
        # Global pooling
        V_out = V_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        T_out = T_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([V_out, T_out], dim=-1)
        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate(concat))
        V_gated = gate * V_out
        T_gated = (1 - gate) * T_out
        
        fused = torch.cat([V_gated, T_gated], dim=-1)
        return self.classifier(fused)

# Alias for compatibility with test harness
FusionLayer = AutoFusionLayer

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Modality projections
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Bilinear fusion
        self.bilinear = nn.Bilinear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2)
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2 + hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Multi-pooling for richer representation
        visual_mean = visual.mean(dim=1)
        visual_max = visual.max(dim=1)[0]
        visual_pooled = (visual_mean + visual_max) / 2
        
        text_mean = text.mean(dim=1)
        text_max = text.max(dim=1)[0]
        text_pooled = (text_mean + text_max) / 2
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(text_feat))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(visual_feat))
        
        visual_gated = visual_feat * gate_v
        text_gated = text_feat * gate_t
        
        # Bilinear interaction
        bilinear_out = self.bilinear(visual_gated, text_gated)
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated, bilinear_out], dim=-1)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention-based pooling
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projections to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion with element-wise product
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 4)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention-weighted pooling
        visual_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(visual), dim=1)
        text_weights = F.softmax(self.text_attn(text), dim=1)
        
        visual_pooled = (visual * visual_weights).sum(dim=1)
        text_pooled = (text * text_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        # Gated features
        visual_gated = visual_feat * gate
        text_gated = text_feat * (1 - gate)
        
        # Element-wise product for multiplicative interaction
        product = visual_feat * text_feat
        
        # Fuse all representations
        fused = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated, product], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion(fused)
        
        # Classification
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Use fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024  # [B, 256, 1024]
        text_dim = 768     # [B, 77, 768]
        
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Projectors with normalization
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion classifier
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 4, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Global average pooling: [B, T, D] -> [B, D]
        v = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t = text.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v)  # [B, 256]
        t = self.t_proj(t)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * gate
        
        # Multi-view fusion features
        mult = v * t
        diff = torch.abs(v - t)
        
        # Combine all features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, mult, diff], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Classify
        out = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        self.hidden_dim = 64
        
        # Project pooled features with normalization
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Tensor fusion branch
        self.tensor_fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64)
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim + 64, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(t)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Gating fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_proj, t_proj], dim=-1)  # [B, 128]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, 64]
        gated_fused = gate * v_proj + (1 - gate) * t_proj  # [B, 64]
        
        # Tensor fusion (outer product)
        outer = torch.bmm(v_proj.unsqueeze(2), t_proj.unsqueeze(1))  # [B, 64, 64]
        outer = outer.view(outer.size(0), -1)  # [B, 4096]
        tensor_fused = self.tensor_fusion(outer)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Combine both fusion approaches
        combined = torch.cat([gated_fused, tensor_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Classify
        out = self.classifier(combined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for visual
        self.v_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Attention pooling for text
        self.t_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Modality-specific encoders
        self.v_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_encoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classification
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling for visual
        v_scores = self.v_attn(visual).squeeze(-1)
        v_weights = F.softmax(v_scores, dim=-1).unsqueeze(-1)
        v_pool = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        v = self.v_encoder(self.v_proj(v_pool))
        
        # Attention pooling for text
        t_scores = self.t_attn(text).squeeze(-1)
        t_weights = F.softmax(t_scores, dim=-1).unsqueeze(-1)
        t_pool = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        t = self.t_encoder(self.t_proj(t_pool))
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * (1 - gate)
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        d = 256
        
        # Projectors
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, d)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, d)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(d)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(d)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(d, num_heads=4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion gate
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d * 2, d),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(d * 4),
            nn.Linear(d * 4, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project and normalize
        v = self.v_ln(self.v_proj(visual))  # [B, 256, d]
        t = self.t_ln(self.t_proj(text))    # [B, 77, d]
        
        # Cross-attention (bidirectional)
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn(v, t, t)  # visual attends to text
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)  # text attends to visual
        
        # Mean pooling
        v_pool = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, d]
        t_pool = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, d]
        v2t_pool = v2t.mean(dim=1)
        t2v_pool = t2v.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        cross_fused = (v2t_pool + t2v_pool) / 2
        
        # Hadamard product
        hadamard = v_pool * t_pool
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1))
        gated_fused = cross_fused * gate
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool, hadamard, gated_fused], dim=-1)
        
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Safely extract dimensions - handle dict, tuple, list, or int
        def extract_dim(info, default_val):
            if isinstance(info, int):
                return info
            elif isinstance(info, (tuple, list)):
                return int(info[-1])
            elif isinstance(info, dict):
                if 'dim' in info:
                    return int(info['dim'])
                elif 'shape' in info:
                    shape = info['shape']
                    if isinstance(shape, (tuple, list)):
                        return int(shape[-1])
                    return int(shape)
                return default_val
            return default_val
        
        self.visual_dim = extract_dim(input_dims.get('visual'), 1024)
        self.text_dim = extract_dim(input_dims.get('text'), 768)
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Adaptive pooling for sequence reduction
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Projections to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Layer normalization
        self.visual_ln = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_ln = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion layer
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Pool sequence dimension (transpose for AdaptiveAvgPool1d)
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_ln(F.gelu(self.visual_proj(v_pooled)))  # [B, 256]
        t = self.text_ln(F.gelu(self.text_proj(t_pooled)))      # [B, 256]
        
        # Add sequence dimension for attention
        v_seq = v.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        t_seq = t.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 1, 256]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        v_attended = v_attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        t_attended = t_attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = self.fusion(torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1))  # [B, 256]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 512
        fusion_dim = 256
        
        # Visual pathway
        self.visual_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, fusion_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(fusion_dim)
        )
        
        # Text pathway
        self.text_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, fusion_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(fusion_dim)
        )
        
        # Feature-wise gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim * 2, fusion_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim * 2, fusion_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(fusion_dim, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Global average pooling
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        text_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)       # [B, 768]
        
        # Encode modalities
        visual_feat = self.visual_fc(visual_pooled)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_fc(text_pooled)        # [B, fusion_dim]
        
        # Compute gating weights
        concat = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, fusion_dim*2]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, fusion_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gated_visual = visual_feat * gate
        gated_text = text_feat * (1 - gate)
        
        # Combine
        fused = torch.cat([gated_visual, gated_text], dim=-1)  # [B, fusion_dim*2]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Use known dimensions from API contract directly
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        embed_dim = 512
        
        # Attention pooling for variable length sequences
        self.v_pool = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_pool = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Projection layers
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, embed_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, embed_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.v_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.t_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Interaction layer
        self.interaction = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 2, embed_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 3, embed_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim // 4),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(embed_dim // 4, 4)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling: (B, N, D) -> (B, D)
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.v_pool(visual), dim=1)
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.t_pool(text), dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v_pooled)
        t = self.t_proj(t_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        v_gate = self.v_gate(v)
        t_gate = self.t_gate(t)
        
        v_cross = v_gate * t + (1 - v_gate) * v
        t_cross = t_gate * v + (1 - t_gate) * t
        
        # Interaction features
        concat_vt = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        interaction = self.interaction(concat_vt)
        
        # Final fusion
        fused_features = torch.cat([v_cross, t_cross, interaction], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion(fused_features)
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Fixed dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        
        self.hidden_dim = 64
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        self.v2t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.t2v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Reduce visual sequence via pooling: (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 32, 1024)
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)
        v = F.avg_pool1d(v, kernel_size=8)
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.visual_proj(v)
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Bidirectional cross-attention
        v_attn, _ = self.v2t_attn(v, t, t)
        v = self.norm_v(v + v_attn)
        
        t_attn, _ = self.t2v_attn(t, v, v)
        t = self.norm_t(t + t_attn)
        
        # Global pooling
        v = v.mean(dim=1)
        t = t.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(concat)
        fused = torch.cat([v * gate, t * gate], dim=-1)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Projections with normalization
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention projections
        self.v_to_t = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_to_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Self-enhancement
        self.v_self = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.t_self = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Pool modalities
        v_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project and normalize
        v = self.v_proj(v_pooled)  # [B, 256]
        t = self.t_proj(t_pooled)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Self-enhancement
        v_self = F.gelu(self.v_self(v))
        t_self = F.gelu(self.t_self(t))
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended = v_self + self.t_to_v(t_self)
        t_attended = t_self + self.v_to_t(v_self)
        
        # Gating fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, 256]
        fused = gate * v_attended + (1 - gate) * t_attended
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Projection layers with normalization
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (text queries visual)
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=hidden_dim,
            num_heads=4,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        self.ln_cross = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Feature gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 4, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(visual)  # B x 256 x 256
        t = self.t_proj(text)  # B x 77 x 256
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        cross, _ = self.cross_attn(t, v, v)
        cross = self.ln_cross(t + cross)  # Residual connection
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pool = v.mean(dim=1)  # B x 256
        t_pool = t.mean(dim=1)  # B x 256
        cross_pool = cross.mean(dim=1)  # B x 256
        
        # Compute gates
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1))
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gated = v_pool * gate
        cross_gated = cross_pool * gate
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool, v_gated, cross_gated], dim=-1)
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Feature projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 128)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, 128)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(256, 128)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(256, 128)
        
        # Bilinear fusion
        self.bilinear = nn.Bilinear(128, 128, 64)
        
        # Classifier
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(128 + 64, 64)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(64, 4)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Global pooling
        v = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t = text.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 768]
        
        # Project
        v = self.v_proj(v)  # [B, 128]
        t = self.t_proj(t)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)  # [B, 256]
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(concat))  # [B, 128]
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(concat))  # [B, 128]
        
        v_gated = v * gate_v
        t_gated = t * gate_t
        
        # Bilinear interaction
        bilinear_out = self.bilinear(v_gated, t_gated)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated + t_gated, bilinear_out], dim=-1)  # [B, 192]
        out = F.relu(self.fc1(fused))
        out = self.fc2(out)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        hidden = 256
        
        # Input projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Linear(1024, hidden)
        self.t_proj = nn.Linear(768, hidden)
        
        # Learnable query tokens (one per output class)
        self.queries = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(4, hidden))
        nn.init.normal_(self.queries, std=0.02)
        
        # Cross-attention to visual
        self.v_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden, 4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.v_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)
        
        # Cross-attention to text
        self.t_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden, 4, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.t_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)
        
        # FFN
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden, hidden * 4),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hidden * 4, hidden)
        )
        self.ffn_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)
        
        # Output projection
        self.output = nn.Linear(hidden, 1)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project modalities to common dimension
        v = self.v_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        t = self.t_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Expand queries to batch
        q = self.queries.unsqueeze(0).expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 4, 256]
        
        # Cross-attend to visual modality
        v_att, _ = self.v_attn(q, v, v)
        q = self.v_ln(q + v_att)
        
        # Cross-attend to text modality
        t_att, _ = self.t_attn(q, t, t)
        q = self.t_ln(q + t_att)
        
        # FFN with residual
        q = self.ffn_ln(q + self.ffn(q))
        
        # Output projection
        out = self.output(q).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 4]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 128
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.v_attn_pool = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.t_attn_pool = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Modality-specific projections
        self.v_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.t_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Bilinear fusion for multiplicative interactions
        self.bilinear = nn.Bilinear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 4, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Attention pooling over sequence dimension
        v_attn = F.softmax(self.v_attn_pool(visual), dim=1)
        t_attn = F.softmax(self.t_attn_pool(text), dim=1)
        
        v_pooled = (visual * v_attn).sum(dim=1)
        t_pooled = (text * t_attn).sum(dim=1)
        
        # Project to hidden dimension
        v = self.v_proj(v_pooled)
        t = self.t_proj(t_pooled)
        
        # Bilinear fusion
        bilinear = self.bilinear(v, t)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1))
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * (1 - gate)
        
        # Element-wise interaction
        elementwise = v * t
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, bilinear, elementwise], dim=-1)
        
        return self.classifier(fused)

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Dimensions from API contract
        visual_dim = 1024
        text_dim = 768
        hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Attention pooling for sequence aggregation
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(visual_dim, 1)
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(text_dim, 1)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(visual_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(text_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 3, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Attention pooling over sequence dimension
        v_attn = self.visual_attn(visual)  # [B, 256, 1]
        t_attn = self.text_attn(text)  # [B, 77, 1]
        
        v_weights = F.softmax(v_attn, dim=1)
        t_weights = F.softmax(t_attn, dim=1)
        
        v_pooled = (visual * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        t_pooled = (text * t_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project and normalize
        v = self.visual_norm(self.visual_proj(v_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        t = self.text_norm(self.text_proj(t_pooled))  # [B, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal gating
        concat = torch.cat([v, t], dim=-1)  # [B, 512]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, 256]
        
        v_gated = v * gate
        t_gated = t * (1 - gate)
        
        # Element-wise fusion
        elem_fusion = v_gated * t_gated
        
        # Final fusion and classify
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, elem_fusion], dim=-1)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output
